name: Synup OS - Best Billing Software for Agencies
highlight_text: Best suited for: Mid-sized marketing & advertising agencies
description:
__POSSIBLE_UNTRANSLATED__

What Synup Does

Synup OS is an all-in-one advertising agency billing software that includes invoicing, e-sign, client portal, and CRM for agencies. Also designed for billing, it lets you bypass the heaps of paperwork that you may have gotten used to. You’ll have a centralized view of all your proposals, contracts, invoices, and everything else in one place.

By automating follow-ups, reminders, and key billing processes, you create greater predictability and stability.

Key Features

  • 🏆 Automated payment follow-ups & dunning (email reminders, activity tracking).
  • 🏆 Recurring subscriptions (monthly/quarterly/annual) with auto-pay.
  • 🏆 One-time, split, and recurring invoices + multi-currency.
  • 🏆 Global payment gateways (Stripe, PayPal) + branded documents.
  • 🏆 Finance workflow automations (pre-set triggers, templates).
  • 🏆 Billing visibility with timestamps and invoice activity tracking.

What Sets Synup Apart from Other Invoicing Tools

  • Complete white-label client portal to centralize communication, files, signatures & payments.
  • Recurring/split invoices & automated reminders built into the OS.
  • Marketing apps to grow retainers (Listings, Reviews, Social) in the same stack.

Benefits of Using Synup

  • Faster cash collection: reminders + auto-pay cut manual chasing.
  • Fewer tools, cleaner ops: billing lives with client work, reviews, listings, social.
  • Global-ready billing: multi-currency and major gateways out of the box.
  • Track Activity: Know when a client has opened/viewed an invoice so you follow up at the right time.

Pricing 

  • Synup OS Base: Starts $79/mo (Plan includes full OS capabilities - CRM/sales/Prospecting/Tasks & invoices; invoicing/e-sign is part of all the OS plans.)

Pros

✅ Strong billing + client-facing portal in one OS.
✅ Recurring/split invoices, multi-currency, branded docs.
✅ Purpose-built automations for finance workflows.

Cons

🚫 Public, granular invoicing price tiers aren’t broken out separately from OS plans.

‍
what_people_say:
__POSSIBLE_UNTRANSLATED__

What Customers Say

“It was surprisingly easy to implement and get started with, even without a dedicated technical team. Their customer support team is also incredibly responsive and helpful whenever I have questions or need assistance.”

– Jonathan Enrique

- Review collected by and hosted on G2.com.
